ham.subject: Out of Office: John Smith
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I will be out of the office from 10th May to 15th May, returning on 16th May. During this period, I will have limited access to email.

For urgent matters, please contact my colleague Sarah Lee at sarah.lee@example.com.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
John Smith

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Your Crypto Wallet Has Been Suspended
spam.body:
Dear User,

We regret to inform you that your crypto wallet (ID: 3A7B-4C2D-9E8F) has been suspended pending verification due to recent security protocols.

To restore access, please confirm your identity by providing the following details within 24 hours:
- Wallet ID
- Last 4 digits of your registered phone number
- A recent transaction confirmation

Please submit the information at <URL>.

Failure to comply may result in irreversible loss of funds. We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

Thank you,
Security Team
